mapper.select: SELECT r.*, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, COALESCE(ic.confirmed_count, 0) AS confirmed_count FROM sp_warehouse_request r LEFT JOIN sp_warehouse w ON r.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT request_id, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed_count FROM sp_warehouse_request_item WHERE is_deleted = '0' GROUP BY request_id ) ic ON r.id = ic.request_id WHERE ORDER BY r.update_time DESC
